creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
> Thanks Koichiro!
> 
> For future updates (or this one if you'd prefer to update the attachment),
> remove rather than comment out PORTREVISION when updating PORTVERSION

If you want to keep the PORTREVISION line, you can also set it to 0 instead of commenting it.
